lesson.subtitle: Aula 20 -- Your Travel English Journey
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Tânia Rosa | Aula 20 -- Your Travel English Journey

listenings.text: Hello, this is a message from your travel agent. Your trip is all ready. Here is a quick check: your flight leaves on Friday morning, and your hotel reservation is confirmed for five nights. The driver will meet you at the airport with a sign. If you need help, call this number any time, day or night. Have a wonderful journey, and do not forget your passport. We hope you make amazing memories.

Hi, it is me, calling from my trip. I want to thank you for everything. Today I checked in at the airport all by myself, in English. I asked for directions, I ordered dinner at a restaurant, and I even made a small complaint when my room was too cold. The staff fixed it right away. I feel so confident now. A year ago this was only a dream, and now it is real. I will call you again from the next city. Take care.

extra_audio.text: First, I arrived at the airport and found my gate without help. Then, I checked in at the hotel and asked for a quiet room. After that, I explored the city and asked a local for directions. Later, I ordered a wonderful dinner at a small restaurant. Finally, I called my family to share the amazing memories. It was the best trip of my life.
